info.title: GitHubWorkflow
info.description: Executes GitHub Actions workflow as a batch script on Windows, macOS or Linux.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

options.name: --cmd
options.description: Emit commands formatted for Windows cmd.exe (on by default on Windows; prepend @echo off, replace trailing backslash with ^, etc). [default: False]

options.name: --wsl
options.description: Force bash-compatible output (disables --cmd even on Windows). [default: False]

options.name: --once
options.description: Use only the first matrix combination per job. [default: False]

arguments.name: workflow-file
arguments.description: GitHub workflow file name (.yml/.yaml or base name).

commands.name: dry
commands.description: Prints run steps for a workflow. [Default]

options.name: --cmd
options.description: Emit commands formatted for Windows cmd.exe (on by default on Windows; prepend @echo off, replace trailing backslash with ^, etc). [default: False]

options.name: --wsl
options.description: Force bash-compatible output (disables --cmd even on Windows). [default: False]

options.name: --once
options.description: Use only the first matrix combination per job. [default: False]

arguments.name: workflow-file
arguments.description: GitHub workflow file name (.yml/.yaml or base name).

commands.name: run
commands.description: Generates a runnable script for a workflow and prints the command to execute it.

options.name: --cmd
options.description: Emit commands formatted for Windows cmd.exe (on by default on Windows; prepend @echo off, replace trailing backslash with ^, etc). [default: False]

options.name: --wsl
options.description: Force bash-compatible output (disables --cmd even on Windows). [default: False]

options.name: --once
options.description: Use only the first matrix combination per job. [default: False]

arguments.name: workflow-file
arguments.description: GitHub workflow file name (.yml/.yaml or base name).

commands.name: new
commands.description: Creates a new workflow template under .github/workflows.

arguments.name: workflow-file
arguments.description: GitHub workflow file name (.yml/.yaml or base name).

commands.name: sleep
commands.description: Sleeps for the specified number of seconds.

arguments.name: seconds
arguments.description: Number of seconds to sleep (supports fractional seconds).
